brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Give me ten rows from auth-svc.

expected.sql: SELECT timestamp, message FROM logs WHERE tags['service'] = 'auth-svc' LIMIT 10

hints.text: Carol: 'Nothing came back. The tag filter is exact — try service:auth-svc.'
Carol: 'Too many rows. LIMIT 10 is already in the query.'
Carol: 'Query error. The tag syntax is key:value — try service:auth-svc.'
Carol: 'service:auth-svc — key colon value, no quotes, no spaces.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Good. Logs are flowing. Whatever they did to the stack last week, this part still works.
